statement:
Yamazaki에만 적합된 지질-촉진 로딩 메커니즘은, **깨끗한 독립 데이터셋**(Tang 2026 조직별 TF,
Kim 2019 곡립 BAF)을 자유음이온(monotone f_xy)·포화 W2 기준선보다 표본외로 더 잘 예측하며,
이 일반화는 여러 데이터셋에 걸쳐 견고하다(현장 교란 데이터셋 Li 2025은 사전등록상 group-water·
표면흡착 교란으로 inconclusive로 취급).

confidence.basis: qualitative judge: The lipid-facilitated loading mechanism's out-of-sample generalization is ROBUST across multiple independent datasets, not a Tang artifact: with all params fit on Yamazaki and transferred without refit, lipid wins decisively on BOTH clean datasets (Tang per-organ TF 0.52 vs 1.23; Kim grain 0.48 vs 2.05, reliable 0.20 vs 1.92) and uniquely captures the Kim grain long-chain rise the baselines miss. The only counter-signal is on the pre-registered-as-confounded Li 2025 field data (W2 wins straw/root TF), which does not bear on the clean-dataset claim and where lipid still wins grain/root. Hypothesis supported, with the honest caveats recorded (Li confound; Kim long-chain low-DF). This strengthens hyp-oos-lipid from n=3 (Tang only) to a robust multi-dataset cross-validation.
